ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state (e.g., AK, AL) */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state (e.g., ALASKA, ALABAMA) */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the state belongs to (e.g., Northeast, Southeast) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the state record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the state record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the financial data was collected */,
  "students" INTEGER /* Number of students in the state */,
  "total_revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue for the state */,
  "federal_revenue" TEXT /* Revenue from federal sources */,
  "state_revenue" TEXT /* Revenue from state sources */,
  "local_revenue" TEXT /* Revenue from local sources */,
  "total_expenditures" TEXT /* Total expenditures for the state */,
  "salaries" TEXT /* Salaries for the state */,
  "teacher_revenue" TEXT /* Revenue allocated to teachers */,
  "operational_expenditures" TEXT /* Expenditures on operational costs */,
  "capital_expenditures" TEXT /* Expenditures on capital projects */,
  "debt_service" TEXT /* Payments on debt */,
  "per_student_spending" TEXT /* Amount spent per student */,
  "funding_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of federal, state, and local funding */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the financial data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the financial data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year the financial data was collected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the year record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the year record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_financial_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data used in the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used in the visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_financial_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being exported */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the exported file */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the exported file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the export was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_financial_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("financial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
